name: Isobe Zukuri (Sashimi Wrapped in Laver)
recipeInstructions:
-----------------------DIPPING SAUCE-----------------------
6 tbsp Chirizu -OR-
6 tbsp Tosa Joyu
IN ADVANCE Cut the fresh fish into slices that are ½-inch thick and 6-7 inches long (as long as a sheet of nori). TO ASSEMBLE AND SERVE: Pass each nori sheet over a flame to enhance its flavor and color. Place the nori flat on a hard surface with the wide side facing you. Lay a long slice of fish along the length of the nori and roll it tightly into a cylindrical shape. Cut crosswise into 1½-inch slices using a sharp knife. Roll and cut the remaining fish and nori in the same way.
